description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a combination of white brick and wood paneling on the exterior. The front features a prominent bay window section with large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a small green lawn bordered by a low wooden fence. A driveway with a pink car leads to the main entrance, which is set between two vertical wood panels. The side of the house includes a balcony with outdoor seating and a trellised wall with climbing plants. The rear of the house is characterized by extensive window coverage, providing ample natural light to the interior. The landscaping includes flower beds, a paved walkway, and a small patio area with garden furniture.
description: A modern two-story house with white brick, wood paneling, large bay windows, and landscaped front and side yards. Features include a driveway, balcony, and extensive window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, bay windows, driveway with a pink car, and landscaped lawn with a fence and garden furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony with outdoor seating, trellised wall, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide expanse of windows and the balcony, emphasizing the house's open and airy design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and the fenced garden area, with less emphasis on windows and more on the building's solid structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large bay windows and extensive glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Central single door recessed between vertical wood panels, no porch, with a paved walkway and minimal decorative elements
